parameters.name: CasId
parameters.description: The ID of the Alibaba Cloud Security certificate. This parameter is required when CertType is set to cas.

parameters.name: CasRegion
parameters.description:
The region of the Alibaba Cloud Security certificate. This parameter is required when CertType is set to cas.

- cn-hangzhou: The value for accounts on the Alibaba Cloud China Website (www\.aliyun.com).

- ap-southeast-1: The value for accounts on the Alibaba Cloud International Website (www\.alibabacloud.com).

parameters.name: CertType
parameters.description:
The certificate type. This parameter is required when SslFlag is set to on.

- **free**: Free certificate.

- **upload**: Uploaded certificate.

- **cas**: Alibaba Cloud Security certificate.

parameters.name: Certificate
parameters.description: The content of the certificate. This parameter is required when CertType is set to upload.

parameters.name: HostnameId
parameters.description: The ID of the SaaS domain name. You can obtain the ID by calling the [ListCustomHostnames](~~3018667~~) operation.

parameters.name: PrivateKey
parameters.description: The private key of the certificate. This parameter is required when CertType is set to upload.

parameters.name: RecordId
parameters.description: The ID of the record to attach. You can obtain the ID by calling the [ListRecords](~~2850265~~) operation.

parameters.name: SslFlag
parameters.description:
The SSL switch.

- **on**: Enables SSL.

- **off**: Disables SSL.
